name: GBA-GCs paper_v1 public georeferenced release
relationship_to_paper: This is the public, boundary-free, stable GitHub table matching the ECCV 2026 paper benchmark count of 37,444 mainland GBA AOIs. The exact controlled metadata, AOI geometries, and imagery remain available only through the controlled-access DUA workflow.
selection: Deterministic city-proportional stable subset from the maintained mainland public table; selected by SHA-256(aoi_id|paper_v1).
license_note: Public boundary-free table for non-commercial research and reproducibility; controlled components require DUA.
